## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Parallax release checklist

- [ ] Static files still exist at repo root: `index.html`, `main.js`, `style.css`, `vercel.json`
- [ ] Governance boundary remains visible: “Modeling tool — not runtime monitoring.”
- [ ] Optional GitHub/Linear adapter language does not imply active monitoring unless credentials are explicitly configured
- [ ] Public links use `https://parallax.mirrornode.xyz`, not old Vercel preview URLs
- [ ] Revenue CTA points to `https://mirrornode.xyz/audit`
- [ ] No legacy Vercel secret indirection is added to `vercel.json`
